---
title: "Integration and matching"
description: "How source records are linked to canonical ALIGN products."
---

Integration pages document the matching hierarchy, enrichment strategies, new-record rules, and provenance fields used when a source is added to the master registry.

## Current integration documentation

- [Essential medicines lists](essential-medicines-lists.qmd)
- [National regulatory authorities](national-regulatory-authorities.qmd)
- [ClinicalTrials.gov enrichment](clinical-trials.qmd)

Each integration should document its input contract, output master-record version, match methods, conflict handling, and audit fields.
